description.zh: 我很惊讶你还活着，神枪手先生的任务可并不简单。从现在起他会给你更多活儿，做好准备。
description.en: It's good that you're alive, tasks from Sniper are not easy. Let's wait for a little before the next test. There is going to be a lot more complicated sniper work from now on, so my advice is that you master your bolt-action rifle handling skills some more. Come back when you're ready.
